text: وَ الَّذِينَ‌ کَفَرُوا وَ کَذَّبُوا بِآيَاتِنَا أُولٰئِکَ‌ أَصْحَابُ‌ الْجَحِيمِ‌

en.ahmedali: But those who disbelieve and deny Our revelations are residents of Hell.
en.ahmedraza: And those who disbelieved and denied Our signs, are the people of hell.
en.arberry: But those who disbelieve, and cry lies to Our signs -- they are the inhabitants of Hell.
en.daryabadi: And those who disbelieved and belied Our signs, they shall be the fellows of the Flaming Fire.
en.hilali: But those who disbelieved and belied Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.), they shall be the dwellers of the (Hell) Fire.
en.itani: But as for those who disbelieve and deny Our signs—these are the inmates of the Fire.
en.maududi: Those who disbelieved and gave the lie to Our signs are rightfully the inmates of the Blazing Flame.
en.mubarakpuri: But those who disbelieved and belied Our Ayat, they shall be the dwellers of Hell.
en.pickthall: But those who disbelieve and deny Our revelations, they are owners of hell-fire.
en.qarai: But those who are faithless and deny Our signs—they shall be the inmates of hell.
en.qaribullah: But those who disbelieve and belie Our verses shall be the companions of Hell.
en.sahih: But those who disbelieved and denied Our signs - they are the companions of Hellfire.
en.sarwar: Those who disbelieved and denied Our revelations will be the dwellers of Hell.
en.shakir: And (as for) those who disbelieve and reject Our communications, these are the companions of the flame.
en.transliteration: Waallatheena kafaroo wakaththaboo biayatina olaika ashabu aljaheemi
en.wahiduddin: But those who deny the truth and deny Our signs will become the inmates of Hell.
en.yusufali: But those who reject Faith and belie our Signs,- they shall be companions of Hell-fire.
fa.ansarian: و آنان که کافر شدند و آیات ما را تکذیب کردند، اهل آتش اند.
fa.ayati: و آنان كه كفر ورزيدند و آيات ما را تكذيب كردند اهل جهنمند.
fa.bahrampour: و كسانى كه كافر شدند و آيات ما را دروغ پنداشتند آنان دوزخى‌اند
fa.fooladvand: و كسانى كه كفر ورزيدند و آيات ما را دروغ پنداشتند، آنان همدم آتشند.
fa.ghomshei: و آنان که کافر شدند و تکذیب آیات ما نمودند ایشان اهل جهنّمند.
fa.khorramdel: و کسانی که کافر شوند و آیات ما را تکذیب کنند، آنان دوزخیانند. [[«أَصْحَابُ الْجَحِیمِ»: یاران دوزخ. دوزخیان.]]
fa.khorramshahi: و کسانی که کفرورزیدند و آیات ما را دروغ انگاشتند، دوزخی‌اند
fa.makarem: و کسانی که کافر شدند و آیات ما را تکذیب کردند، همانها اهل دوزخند.
fa.moezzi: و آنان که کفر ورزیدند و دروغ پنداشتند آیتهای ما را آنانند یاران دوزخ‌
fa.mojtabavi: و كسانى كه كافر شدند و آيات ما را دروغ انگاشتند آنها دوزخيانند.
fa.sadeqi: و کسانی که کفر ورزیدند و با آیات ما (همان‌ها و ما را) تکذیب کردند، آنان همدمان آتشند.
